summary: A data-driven Oscar prediction model trained on historical nominees, precursor awards, TMDb metadata, person-level features, and walk-forward backtesting.
data_sources: Oscar Big Six nominee and winner history
Media sentiment and awards-buzz feature layers
validation: Walk-forward validation trains only on prior years when predicting a held-out year.
Winner models are category-specific instead of one giant cross-category model.
Current production winner models use the untuned best model family selected by backtesting.
limitations: Ranks known nominees only; it does not yet discover all eligible films.
Some source data is sparse or sample-based, especially media sentiment.
Feature explanations summarize model signals and should not be treated as causal proof.
